discoveries.description: Production-ready platform for agentic workflow development.
The agent engineering platform.
Python ETL framework for stream processing, real-time analytics, LLM pipelines, and RAG.
Free universal database tool and SQL client
ClickHouse® is a real-time analytics database management system
Apache Airflow - A platform to programmatically author, schedule, and monitor workflows
[EMNLP2025] "LightRAG: Simple and Fast Retrieval-Augmented Generation"
🪢 Open source LLM engineering platform: LLM Observability, metrics, evals, prompt management, playground, datasets. Integrates with OpenTelemetry, Langchain, OpenAI SDK, LiteLLM, and more. 🍊YC W23

The open source AI engineering platform for agents, LLMs, and ML models. MLflow enables teams of all sizes to debug, evaluate, monitor, and optimize production-quality AI applications while controlling costs and managing access to models and data.

Open-source AI orchestration framework for building context-engineered, production-ready LLM applications. Design modular pipelines and agent workflows with explicit control over retrieval, routing, memory, and generation. Built for scalable agents, RAG, multimodal applications, semantic search, and conversational systems.
A high-performance observability data pipeline.
🔥 MaxKB is an open-source platform for building enterprise-grade agents.  强大易用的开源企业级智能体平台。
📊 Cube Core is open-source semantic layer for AI, BI and embedded analytics

Weaviate is an open-source vector database that stores both objects and vectors, allowing for the combination of vector search with structured filtering with the fault tolerance and scalability of a cloud-native database​.
Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.
LLM inference server with continuous batching & SSD caching for Apple Silicon — managed from the macOS menu bar
Apache Doris is an easy-to-use, high performance and unified analytics database.
Official repository of Trino, the distributed SQL query engine for big data, formerly known as PrestoSQL (https://trino.io)
Redpanda is a streaming data platform for developers. Kafka API compatible. 10x faster. No ZooKeeper. No JVM!

The world's fastest open query engine for sub-second analytics both on and off the data lakehouse. With the flexibility to support nearly any scenario, StarRocks provides best-in-class performance for multi-dimensional analytics, real-time analytics, and ad-hoc queries. A Linux Foundation project.
Build, Manage and Deploy AI/ML Systems
Run, manage, and scale AI workloads on any AI infrastructure. Use one system to access & manage all AI compute (Kubernetes, Slurm, 20+ clouds, on-prem).
cuDF - GPU DataFrame Library
Data Agent Ready Warehouse : One for  Analytics, Search, AI, Python Sandbox.  — rebuilt from scratch. Unified architecture on your S3.
Python SQL Parser and Transpiler
Event streaming platform for agentic AI. Continuously ingest, transform, and serve event streams in real time, at scale.
Apache DataFusion SQL Query Engine
Open Source Feature Flags, Experimentation, and Product Analytics
The Open Source Feature Store for AI/ML
AI + Data, online. https://vespa.ai
Hazelcast is a unified real-time data platform combining stream processing with a fast data store, allowing customers to act instantly on data-in-motion for real-time insights.

Open Lakehouse Format for Multimodal AI. Convert from Parquet in 2 lines of code for 100x faster random access, vector index, and data versioning. Compatible with Pandas, DuckDB, Polars, Pyarrow, and PyTorch with more integrations coming..
Statistical Machine Intelligence & Learning Engine
The live data layer for apps and AI agents. Create up-to-the-second views into your business, just using SQL
Upserts, Deletes And Incremental Processing on Big Data.
data load tool (dlt) is an open source Python library that makes data loading easy 🛠️
⚡️next-generation personal AI assistant powered by LLM, RAG and agent loops, supporting computer-use, browser-use and coding agent, demo: https://demo.openagentai.org
World's most powerful open data catalog for building a high-performance, geo-distributed and federated metadata lake.
C++ DataFrame for statistical, financial, and ML analysis in modern C++
Drop-in Apache Spark replacement written in Rust, unifying batch processing, stream processing, and compute-intensive AI workloads.
A MySQL-compatible relational database with a storage agnostic query engine. Implemented in Go.
ArcticDB is a high performance, serverless DataFrame database built for the Python Data Science ecosystem.
Data Contracts engine for the modern data stack. https://www.soda.io
LeanCTX — the cognitive context layer for agentic systems. 62 MCP tools, 10 read modes, 60+ shell patterns. Up to 99% token savings. Works with Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot, Windsurf, Codex, Gemini.
⚡  Fastest SQL ETL pipeline in a single C++ binary,  built for stream processing, observability, analytics and AI/ML
YTsaurus is a scalable and fault-tolerant open-source big data platform.
Apache DataFusion Ballista Distributed Query Engine
Apache Fluss is a streaming storage built for real-time analytics.
Machine learning with dataframes
Databricks Toolkit for Coding Agents provided by Field Engineering
Custom AI agent platform to speed up your work.
👾 nao is an open source analytics agent. (1) Create context with nao-core cli, (2) deploy nao chat interface for everyone
RTP-LLM: Alibaba's high-performance LLM inference engine for diverse applications.
csghub-server is the backend server for CSGHub which helps user to manage datasets, modes, and also run Model Inference, Finetune and Application Spaces.
Graph database implementing the RDF and SPARQL standards. Very fast and scales to more than a trillion triples on a single commodity machine
An experimental embedded SQL engine in C++20. Query Parquet, CSV, JSON, Arrow, Avro, SQLite, and Excel files directly with SQL, in-process. Early-stage.
NucliaDB, The AI Search database for RAG
Curate, Annotate, and Manage Your Data in LightlyStudio.
Databricks Terraform Provider
📬 A knowledge graph querying framework for JavaScript
Databricks SDK for Python (Beta)
Executable memory system for tabular data work
